description_long: This object consists of two pairs of tall rubber boots, each pair featuring a distinct color: one in dark green and the other in a muted brown. The boots have a high shaft that extends well above the ankle, providing ample coverage for the lower leg, typical of rain or work boots. The soles are thick and slightly raised, likely made of a more durable, black rubber material for added grip and protection. The surface of the boots appears matte and slightly textured, suggesting a grippy, non-slip finish suitable for wet or muddy urban environments. There are no visible logos, laces, or decorative elements, giving the boots a utilitarian and functional appearance. The interior is not visible, but the boots are likely lined with a softer material for comfort.
description: Two pairs of tall, matte-finished rubber boots in dark green and brown, with thick black soles and a utilitarian design. The boots are high-shafted, slip-on style, and lack visible logos or laces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe and shaft of both pairs, highlighting the color difference and the solid, rounded toe design.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the height of the boots and the thickness of the black soles, with the shaft curvature visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the boots, the heel structure, and the uniformity of the shaft.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the boots and the subtle texture of the surface.
